--- JESJCLIN ---
//CARVRLD JOB (A),'LD RLD REF',                                         JOB  457
//          CLASS=A,MSGCLASS=H,
//          MSGLEVEL=(1,1),
//          NOTIFY=IBMUSER,
//         USER=IBMUSER,
//         PASSWORD=
//*
//ASM      EXEC PGM=IFOX00,
//          PARM='DECK,LIST,NOLOAD,TERM,XREF(SHORT),RENT'
//SYSLIB   DD DSN=SYS1.MACLIB,DISP=SHR
//SYSUT1   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSUT2   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSUT3   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSPUNCH DD DSN=&&OBJ,DISP=(NEW,PASS),UNIT=SYSDA,
//            SPACE=(TRK,(1,1)),DCB=(RECFM=FB,LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=3120)
//SYSTERM  DD SYSOUT=*
//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*
//SYSGO    DD DUMMY
//SYSIN    DD *
�& �  �  
//*
//LINK     EXEC PGM=IEWL,PARM='NCAL,LIST,MAP,XREF,LET,RENT',
//          COND=(4,LT,ASM)
//SYSUT1   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*
//SYSLMOD  DD DSN=IBMUSER.CARVEOUT.LOAD(RLDT),DISP=SHR
//SYSLIN   DD DSN=&&OBJ,DISP=(OLD,PASS)
//         DD *
�& �  �  
//
******** JOB DELETED BY JES2 OR CANCELLED BY OPERATOR BEFORE EXECUTION ********

 1.59.06 JOB  457  IEFACTRT ASM     /IFOX00  /00:00:00.04/00:00:00.09/00000/CARVRLD

 1.59.06 JOB  457  $HASP395 CARVRLD  ENDED

--- SYSIN ---
RLDT     CSECT
         BR    14
VEXT     DC    V(EXTRTN)
ASELF    DC    A(RLDT)
         END
/*
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

--- UNK0102 ---
  ENTRY RLDT
/*
